$schema-note: Asset registry. Every asset carries a `description` (what it is, written from actually looking at the file) and a `placement` prompt (how it must be placed and what a validator should check).

brand.name: Universidade Federal de Pelotas (UFPel)
brand.fonts: Montserrat variable 100-900 (static/fonts/Montserrat[wght].ttf), loaded via @font-face in the templates
brand.source: Manual de Identidade Visual da UFPel, CCS AGO/2021

assets.description: Official colored UFPel marca: circular escudo (deep blue with light-blue rays, orange pelota, green waves, torch with red flame) + vertical fio separador + 'UFPEL' sigla in deep blue Gotham Bold. Transparent background. PNG twin: static/ufpel-marca.png.
assets.placement: LIGHT SURFACES ONLY — the identity manual explicitly forbids the colored marca on dark or textured backgrounds. Content-slide footers (34-42px tall) and document headers (8-10mm tall). Never recolor, outline, shadow, rotate, distort, or frame; clearance around it of at least the escudo-to-fio gap. Validate: legible, unmodified, on white/pale surface only, not overlapping content.

assets.description: White traço (negativo) version of the marca: escudo line-art + fio + UFPEL sigla, all in solid white. Invisible on white — dark surfaces only.
assets.placement: Dark surfaces only (covers, dividers, closings, dark-slide footers). Top-left on hero pages, height 80-96px (slides) / 18-24mm (documents). Footer use: 34-42px tall. Same integrity vetoes as the colored marca. Validate: legible, unmodified, correct corner, not overlapping content.

assets.description: Official colored escudo alone (no sigla): circular shield, 'UNIVERSIDADE FEDERAL DE PELOTAS' and 'RS-BRASIL' inscriptions, alpha/omega + torch + pelota + waves.
assets.placement: Light surfaces only, for official-document contexts (title pages, certificates) where the round shield reads better than the horizontal marca. Height 90-140px (slides) / 20-30mm (documents). Same integrity vetoes as the marca. Validate: perfectly circular (no distortion), on light surface, clear space respected.

assets.description: Generated UFPel hero surface: smooth diagonal gradient from deep navy (top-left) through official blue #00408F to a soft lifted-blue glow with subtle luzeiro rays at the bottom-right. Gaussian-dithered so it never bands in the PDF print path.
assets.placement: Default background for hero pages (ppt title/closing, doc covers) under a `.hero-veil`. Text always sits on the darker left/top side; nothing important over the bright corner. Portrait (A4) crops use object-position ~30% so the visible band stays deep blue. For subtle dark backgrounds (section dividers, quotes) use the templates' blue-only CSS `.ufpel-gradient` instead. Pair ONLY with the white traço marca — never the colored one.
